headline: FCC chair slams broadcasters after Trump disputes reports on Iran-damaged U.S. tankers
summary: FCC Chair Brendan Carr blasted broadcasters shortly after President Donald Trump called reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."

raw.headline: FCC chair slams broadcasters after Trump disputes reports on Iran-damaged U.S. tankers
raw.summary: FCC Chair Brendan Carr blasted broadcasters shortly after President Donald Trump called reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."

headline: A Paramount-Warner Bros. movie slate could rule the 2027 box office, but is it sustainable?
summary: Paramount CEO David Ellison has said he wants to make 30 movies a year and has franchises like Godzilla-Kong, Superman and Sonic the Hedgehog to lean on.

raw.headline: A Paramount-Warner Bros. movie slate could rule the 2027 box office, but is it sustainable?
raw.summary: Paramount CEO David Ellison has said he wants to make 30 movies a year and has franchises like Godzilla-Kong, Superman and Sonic the Hedgehog to lean on.
